criteria.description: The brief preserves the decision, target, risks, and superseded-owner relationship from the three bounded sources.
Completeness and the distinction between draft, approved, and open evidence are explicit without invented certainty.
Every requested decision-brief field and both open risks are covered.
The synthesis leads with the approved decision and the unresolved constraints a reader must act on.
The brief compresses three sources without repeating raw sections or unrelated appendix content.
